zh.lifeSummary: 當David Littlefield於1660年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯時，他的父親Francis Littlefield25歲，母親Meribah Wardell23歲。他於1694年11月15日與Mary Mercy Hill在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1751年9月28日在他的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯利特利費爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Littlefield于1660年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯时，他的父亲Francis Littlefield25岁，母亲Meribah Wardell23岁。他于1694年11月15日与Mary Mercy Hill在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1751年9月28日在他的家乡享年91岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯利特利費爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Littlefield was born in 1660, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Francis Littlefield, was 25 and his mother, Meribah Wardell, was 23. He married Mary Mercy Hill on 15 November 1694, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 28 September 1751, in his hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Littlefield est né en 1660, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Francis Littlefield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Meribah Wardell, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mary Mercy Hill le 15 novembre 1694, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1751, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Littlefield 1660 in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Francis Littlefield 25 und seine Mutter Meribah Wardell 23. Er hat am 15. November 1694 in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Mercy Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 28. September 1751 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: David Littlefieldが1660年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで生まれた時，父Francis Littlefieldは25歳，母Meribah Wardellは23歳であった。1694年11月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズでMary Mercy Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1751年9月28日に故郷で91歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズリットレフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Littlefield(이)가 1660년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Littlefield(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Meribah Wardell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1694년 11월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 Mary Mercy Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1751년 9월 28일 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스 리틀레필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Littlefield nasceu em 1660, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Francis Littlefield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Meribah Wardell, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Mercy Hill em 15 de novembro de 1694, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1751, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Littlefield родился в 1660 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Francis Littlefield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Meribah Wardell, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Mercy Hill 15 ноября 1694 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 28 сентября 1751 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности литлефиелд кеметири, веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Littlefield nació en 1660, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Francis Littlefield, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Meribah Wardell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mary Mercy Hill el 15 de noviembre de 1694, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1751, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
